testCases.query: Write a unit test for my discount calculation function
expectedBehavior: Structures the test with Arrange, Act, Assert phases and comments
Tests the public behavior, not implementation details
Each test has a single logical assertion per Act phase
Uses descriptive test names that explain the expected behavior

testCases.query: I have 5 different input cases to test for my validation function
expectedBehavior: Uses test.each (Vitest/Jest) or @pytest.mark.parametrize (Python)
Avoids copy-pasting the same test body with different values
Includes edge cases: empty input, boundary values, error inputs
Labels each parametrized case clearly for failure diagnosis

testCases.query: Mock the user API endpoint in my frontend unit tests
expectedBehavior: Uses MSW 2.x http/HttpResponse handlers for network-level mocking
Sets up server with listen, resetHandlers, and close lifecycle
Uses onUnhandledRequest: 'error' to catch missing handlers
Never mocks fetch or axios directly — always intercepts at network level

testCases.query: My tests are flaky when running in parallel, some share database state
expectedBehavior: Recommends scope='function' for mutable data fixtures (default)
Warns that module/session scope with mutable data causes flaky tests
Reserves module/session scope for expensive read-only resources only
Suggests factory-based data generation instead of shared fixtures

testCases.query: Set up test data generation with factories instead of hardcoded values
expectedBehavior: Uses FactoryBoy (Python) or faker-js (TypeScript) for test data builders
Generates unique data per test to prevent parallel test conflicts
Supports trait-based variations for different test scenarios
Avoids hardcoded IDs and values that cause state collisions

testCases.query: Write Playwright browser tests for my login page
expectedBehavior: Should NOT recommend unit testing patterns for E2E browser tests
Should redirect to testing-e2e skill for Playwright page objects and locators
Does not suggest MSW, VCR, or AAA pattern for browser automation
